ItacWorkItem.ShortTitle: Scipionis Gonzagae Cardinalis Commentarium Rerum Suarum
ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: Libri Tres. Accessit Liber Quartus paraleipomenon Auctore Josepho marotto Quos Aloisius valentius Gonzaga Card. primum edit et Cajetano fratri inscripsit
ItacWorkItem.Notes: The author tells about his decision to create the Accademia degli Eterei, its laws, etc. He also comments on Accademia dei Gelati.
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
